mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (payment_id, attend_date, status) SELECT p.payment_id, CURDATE(), '결석' FROM payment p INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM attendance a WHERE a.payment_id = p.payment_id AND a.attend_date = CURDATE() )
mapper.select: SELECT p.payment_id, u.name AS studentName, s.name AS subjectName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, c.name AS classroomName, t1.teacherName, IFNULL(a.status, '결석') AS status, IFNULL(a.attend_date, CURDATE()) AS attendDate, a.attendance_id AS attendanceId FROM payment p JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id JOIN user u ON u.user_id = se.student_id JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = se.lecture_id JOIN subject s ON s.subject_id = l.subject_id JOIN classroom c ON l.classroom_id = c.classroom_id JOIN ( SELECT l.lecture_id, u.name AS teacherName, u.user_id AS teacherId FROM user u JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON u.user_id = ta.teacher_id JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id ) t1 ON l.lecture_id = t1.lecture_id LEFT JOIN attendance a ON a.payment_id = p.payment_id AND DATE(a.attend_date) = CURDATE() WHERE t1.teacherId = #{teacherId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (payment_id, status, attend_date) VALUES (#{paymentId}, #{status}, CURDATE())
